mapper.select: SELECT video_count AS videoCount, user_count AS userCount, comment_count AS commentCount, behavior_count AS behaviorCount, total_play_count AS totalPlayCount, source_platform_count AS sourcePlatformCount FROM tenant_overview_cache WHERE tenant_user_id = #{tenantUserId} AND source_platform = #{cachePlatform} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenant_overview_cache (tenant_user_id, source_platform, video_count, user_count, comment_count, behavior_count, total_play_count, source_platform_count, refreshed_at) VALUES (#{tenantUserId}, #{cachePlatform}, #{videoCount}, #{userCount}, #{commentCount}, #{behaviorCount}, #{totalPlayCount}, #{sourcePlatformCount}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE video_count = VALUES(video_count), user_count = VALUES(user_count), comment_count = VALUES(comment_count), behavior_count = VALUES(behavior_count), total_play_count = VALUES(total_play_count), source_platform_count = VALUES(source_platform_count), refreshed_at = VALUES(refreshed_at)
